title: 第二幕　今宵、世界は素晴らしく

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki's popularity continues to rise with no
end in sight. The younger student who's been
following her races comes to speak with her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She explains how it's thanks to Fuji Kiseki that she
was able to realize something important about
herself, but Fuji Kiseki seems conflicted by this
confession...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki realizes it's not only this one younger
student feeling limited by her distance aptitude,
and she sets a new goal for herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She declares that she'll take on and conquer four
G1 races of varying distances!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I throw my full support behind her. When she
makes the grand announcement about her plans,
the world is thrown into a frenzy!
